title: lepidium nebrodense
intro: Lepidium nebrodense, also known as Sardinian cress or mountain pepperwort, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to its high content of glucosinolates and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Lepidium nebrodense is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a fresh ingredient in salads or as a garnish.
